title: Node 24 full migration across EB stack (supersedes d-2026-06-09-eb-node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical)
description: Full Node 24 migration across the EB stack: CI workflows (9), package.json engines (3), container Dockerfiles (7), runtime pins (.nvmrc and devcontainer.json), inline image references in Kubernetes manifests (3). 24 files total across 5 axes. Supersedes d-2026-06-09-eb-node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical (v1.0.0) which had 12-file scope insufficient for the failure mechanism. Closes FU-NODE20-DEPRECATION-1 (P3, past GitHub-forced 2026-06-02 deadline). DELETE-AND-NEW-DELIVERABLE terminal per SPIKE spike/node-24-full-migration-surface-2026-06-09 authorized 2026-06-09 by L4.

outputs.description: 9 CI workflows transformed to canonical Option 2 pattern. pnpm-using workflows get pnpm/action-setup@v6 inserted before setup-node@v5 with cache pnpm; npm-only workflows get cache npm; redundant Enable Corepack and Install pnpm steps removed; production-validation.yml gets pnpm/action-setup v4 to v6 sync.
acceptanceCriteria: No setup-node@v4 reference remains in any of the 9 scoped workflow files
No node-version with value 20 or 20.x array remains in any of the 9 scoped workflow files
Every setup-node@v5 step has either cache pnpm (with pnpm/action-setup@v6 step preceding it) or cache npm (for npm-only workflows publish-crm-package.yml and roadmap-v3-validation.yml)
production-validation.yml pnpm/action-setup version bumped from v4 to v6
speckle-env-schema.yml verified untouched (still on node-version 22, out of scope)

outputs.description: engines.node version constraint bumped from >=20.0.0 to >=24.0.0 in 3 package.json files.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json (root) engines.node equals >=24.0.0
apps/ectropy-console/package.json engines.node equals >=24.0.0
apps/mcp-server/package.json engines.node equals >=24.0.0

outputs.description: 7 Dockerfile FROM lines bumped from node:20-* to node:24-*. 6 alpine-based Dockerfiles use node:24-alpine in both builder and runner stages; .devcontainer/Dockerfile.dev uses node:24-bullseye.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/api-gateway/Dockerfile lines 2 and 138 use node:24-alpine
apps/web-dashboard/Dockerfile lines 2 and 124 use node:24-alpine
apps/mcp-server/Dockerfile lines 2 and 104 use node:24-alpine
apps/ectropy-console/Dockerfile lines 3 and 88 use node:24-alpine
apps/ectropy-console/Dockerfile.standalone lines 1 and 17 use node:24-alpine
apps/edge-server/Dockerfile lines 8 and 63 use node:24-alpine
.devcontainer/Dockerfile.dev line 3 uses node:24-bullseye
No FROM node:20-* directive remains in any of the 7 in-scope Dockerfiles
Docker build smoke test for api-gateway and web-dashboard completes pnpm install without ERR_PNPM_UNSUPPORTED_ENGINE

outputs.description: Runtime and dev environment Node version pins bumped to Node 24.
acceptanceCriteria: .nvmrc file content equals 24
.devcontainer/devcontainer.json features ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/node:1 version field equals 24

outputs.description: Kubernetes manifest inline image: node:20 references bumped to image: node:24.
acceptanceCriteria: infrastructure/kubernetes/ai-agents/ai-agents-deployment.yaml inline node image reference equals node:24
infrastructure/kubernetes/iot/iot-integration-deployment.yaml inline node image reference equals node:24
infrastructure/kubernetes/backup/disaster-recovery-deployment.yaml inline node image reference equals node:24
No image: node:20 directive remains in any of the 3 in-scope k8s manifest files

outputs.description: Both stale PRs from prior arc executions handled. PR #321 (12-file canonical-pnpm scope on branch chore/node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical-2026-06-09, created by prior arc tarball PHASES 1-4 between SPIKE direction and Dockerfile substrate reveal) closed without merge with audit comment referencing this superseding deliverable id. Branch chore/node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical-2026-06-09 deleted local plus remote. PR #320 plus branch chore/node-24-workflow-bump-2026-06-09 already cleared in prior arc execution (idempotent verify-only).
acceptanceCriteria: PR #321 state is CLOSED (not MERGED)
Branch chore/node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical-2026-06-09 is absent from git ls-remote origin output

PR #321 audit comment names this new deliverable id d-2026-06-09-eb-node-24-full-migration and references the SPIKE that authorized supersession plus the v1.0.1 amendment that corrected the PR reference
Idempotent verification: PR #320 confirmed CLOSED (already from prior arc)
Idempotent verification: Branch chore/node-24-workflow-bump-2026-06-09 confirmed absent (already deleted in prior arc)

outputs.description: Replacement PR opens on chore/node-24-full-migration-2026-06-09 with explicit 24-file scope (no .dlp/ bleed, no unrelated drift).
acceptanceCriteria: New PR opens against main from branch chore/node-24-full-migration-2026-06-09
Single commit on the new branch touches exactly the 24 files declared in scopeFiles (no .dlp/ or other unexpected paths)
All 3 required ruleset checks pass on PR CI (NV-03, vestigial .js, patterns.yml)
Foundation Health and Enterprise Test Suite and Build Staging Images workflows pass on PR CI (no ERR_PNPM_UNSUPPORTED_ENGINE)

preMerge: Tarball applier sandbox-validated chat-side against representative fixtures for each file class (workflow YAML, package.json JSON, Dockerfile FROM, .nvmrc plaintext, devcontainer.json JSON features block, k8s YAML inline image)
Idempotent re-apply produces 0 changes on already-transformed fixtures
SHA-drift refusal triggers exit code 1 on mismatched HEAD
Post-write verify confirms no setup-node@v4, no node-version 20 or 20.x, no FROM node:20-*, no image: node:20 in scoped files
All 3 required ruleset checks pass on PR CI
Pre-merge Nx 21.5.3 plus Node 24 compatibility smoke test (pnpm nx run-many --target=lint dry-run from CI on PR branch) completes without engine error
commit_and_merge.sh PHASE 3 stages explicit 24-file list and aborts if any unexpected file would be staged
postMerge: Main HEAD advances to squash-merge commit SHA
Foundation Health and Build Staging Images and Enterprise Test Suite workflows turn green on main
FU-NODE20-DEPRECATION-1 register status flipped to closed in next hygiene cycle
EB-chat posts merge notice to #luhtech-agents-comms with full 40-char SHA per memory #27

transitions.trigger: EB-chat authored post SPIKE PHASE S0 substrate-capture (5 axes surface mapped to 24 files). Supersedes d-2026-06-09-eb-node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical per DELETE-AND-NEW-DELIVERABLE SPIKE terminal authorized by L4 in EB-chat 2026-06-09.

v1.0.1 amendment per L4 named-step in EB-chat 2026-06-09. OUT-6 substrate-correction: v1.0.0 referenced PR #320 plus branch chore/node-24-workflow-bump-2026-06-09 which were already handled by prior arc execution; actual outstanding stale state is PR #321 plus branch chore/node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical-2026-06-09 created by prior arc tarball PHASES 1-4. Memory #1 confident-then-retract pattern, fourth occurrence in this arc, surfaced and corrected before tarball authoring per memory #5 REFUSE-AND-SURFACE.

EB PR #322 squash-merged. All 7 OUTs delivered against 24-file declared scope (no scope bleed). Required ruleset checks (NV-03, vestigial .js, patterns.yml) all PASS. Docker builds api-gateway/web-dashboard/mcp-server all GREEN (root failure mechanism resolved by axis 3+4 alignment confirmed). Pre-existing CI rot at validate (24.x) classified per memory #16 diff-vs-baseline, tracked separately as carry-forward FU-EB-CI-INFRASTRUCTURE-ROT-1.
TRUTH-DELIVERED instance landed at schemas/_instances/truth-delivered/d-2026-06-09-eb-node-24-full-migration.json. Closure status: closed-clean. Cross-repo doctrine F0B85LNSTC4 cycle complete.

notes: Supersedes d-2026-06-09-eb-node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical (v1.0.0) which had 12-file scope insufficient for full Node 24 migration. SPIKE spike/node-24-full-migration-surface-2026-06-09 (L4-authorized entry 2026-06-09) mapped surface to 24 files across 5 axes via SPIKE PHASE S0 read-only substrate dispatch. Failure mechanism root cause: .npmrc engine-strict=true plus root package.json engines.node bumped to >=24.0.0 plus Dockerfiles still FROM node:20-alpine causes ERR_PNPM_UNSUPPORTED_ENGINE in every Docker pnpm install layer. My prior session classification of Build Staging Images Docker failure as 'pre-existing rot' was incorrect (memory #1 confident-then-retract pattern, third occurrence in this arc). Prior spec d-2026-06-09-eb-node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical transitions to lifecycleState S6-superseded referencing this new spec id; prior held EB tarball SHA bb9f54c5d774163fb1236a7f2428e8e0cebf48e375305d757c9a0a50e6fe506a is abandoned-on-terminal. SR-chat handles supersession transition plus landing of this new spec in the same SR PR per scope-lock exception precedent (cycle 7 SR PR #159 pattern). Risk flag: Nx 21.5.3 official Node 24 verification absent; preMerge smoke test required. DEC authoring for the architectural Node 24 migration decision is not in this deliverable scope and may be authored by SR-chat as a parallel artifact. v1.0.1 amendment (2026-06-09): OUT-6 description plus acceptanceCriteria updated to reference PR #321 + branch chore/node-24-bump-pnpm-canonical-2026-06-09 as the actual outstanding stale state from prior arc execution. PR #320 and original CLI-improvised branch chore/node-24-workflow-bump-2026-06-09 are idempotent verify-only (already handled in prior arc). Semver: PATCH (clarification of which PR is actually stale; no behavioral change to deliverable goal of closing prior-arc residue).
